characters.appearance: Black male, around 30 years old, bald with a thick, well-groomed black beard. He has a medium build.
characters.wardrobe: Grey hoodie worn underneath a dark blue or black puffer vest.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, slightly nervous but proud, actively engaged in conversation.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: तुम English बोलते हो? [You speak English?]
Character A says: हाँ। [Yes.]
Character A says: अगर मैं तुम्हारे साथ अपनी English practice करूँ, तो चलेगा? [Is it okay if I practice my English with you?]
Character B says: हाँ, बिल्कुल। [Yes, absolutely.]
Character B says: कब से सीख रहे हो? [How long have you been learning?]
Character A says: करीब पाँच महीने से। [For about five months.]
Character B says: पर तुम बहुत अच्छी English बोलते हो। [But you speak very good English.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: हाँ! मुझे लगा तुम सालों से सीख रहे हो! [Yes! I thought you'd been learning for years!]
Character B says: क्या तुम्हारे पास कोई है जिसके साथ तुम practice करते हो? [Do you have someone you practice with?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova नाम की एक app use कर रहा हूँ। [I have been using an app called Supernova.]
Character A says: ये एक app है जिससे मैं English सीख सकता हूँ। [It's an app I can use to learn English.]
Character A says: इसमें AI tutor है। [It has an AI tutor.]
Character B says: अच्छा। [Uh-huh.]
Character A says: रोज़ English practice करने के लिए। [To practice English daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable, low-stakes environment (a car ride) where the learner feels safe testing their new language skills.
- Highlights the core problem of finding a speaking partner and introduces Supernova's AI tutor as the practical solution.
- Delivers a strong emotional payoff through the driver's genuine surprise at the learner's fluency.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clean, distraction-free branding moment.
- Reinforces the Supernova brand name immediately after the value proposition is delivered.
